words.w: 時差を越えて、また君へ送信

prev.lrc:
[00:06.96]This for the ones nobody checks on
[00:11.28]Because they look like they got it together
[00:16.00]Bills paid, kids fed, smile ready
[00:20.02]But somewhere between Queens and Brooklyn
[00:24.13]Under the elevated
[00:26.72]Somebody is asking
[00:27.91]Is
[00:29.57]this really addiction?
[00:31.94]You work hard, you deserve peace
[00:37.36]Come here
[00:50.08]Queens Boulevard got my promises
[00:53.52]Brooklyn nights got my shame
[00:56.58]I keep showing
[00:57.42]I keep showing
[00:57.60]I keep showing up like I'm solid
[00:58.54]I keep coming home the same
[01:01.54]Rent paid, lights on, fridge full
[01:05.54]Everybody thinks I'm blessed
[01:07.12]I keep my body right, keep my money good
[01:09.80]Still got smoke inside my chest
[01:13.14]Corner store glowing like a chapel
[01:17.02]Midnight glass behind the door
[01:18.79]I tell myself I'm only looking
[01:21.97]But my hand already knows
[01:25.02]Long day
[01:26.20]Don't make it deep
[01:27.60]One little flame, one little drink
[01:30.54]One little sleep
[01:34.24]And it don't feel like addiction
[01:38.26]It feels like I'm still in control
[01:40.34]Like I can stop when I'm ready
[01:44.36]Like I can leave it alone
[01:46.03]I quit three days just to prove it
[01:50.16]Then came back like I won
[01:51.76]But that ain't freedom
[01:53.36]That's just losing with a different kind of gun
[01:57.60]The cage don't always rattle
[02:00.52]Sometimes it sings
[02:01.40]I'm chasing the dragon under the elevated
[02:05.34]Trying to catch what don't come back no more
[02:08.38]First time flew, now I'm stuck here waiting
[02:11.14]With my heart face down on the floor
[02:14.06]It don't feel like addiction
[02:15.52]It feels like tomorrow
[02:16.88]Feels like one more night
[02:18.60]Feels like my old sorrow
[02:20.04]I wanna quit but I want that fire
[02:22.72]I want the truth but I love the liar
[02:26.40]And the dragon don't fly
[02:27.56]No more
[02:29.04]On the J train with my jaw tight
[02:33.07]On the seven with my head low
[02:36.86]Every ad says buy your freedom
[02:38.48]Every craving says don't let go
[02:41.30]I got side dreams, side gigs
[02:44.08]Plans folded in my notes
[02:47.20]But I keep feeding little habits
[02:49.66]That keep standing on my throat
[02:52.54]I say next week like a prayer
[02:54.84]Say last time like a song
[02:56.98]Say I'm back to where I was
[02:57.56]Good when I'm lying
[02:58.46]Say I'm fine when I'm gone
[02:59.94]Gone
[03:00.52]Baby you're here
[03:02.08]I'm the only thing clear
[03:05.31]When the city gets heavy
[03:08.16]I disappear your fear
[03:10.64]You call me poison but I call you mine
[03:13.40]You call it weakness, I call it time
[03:16.32]Don't call me yours
[03:18.56]Then why do you answer?
[03:21.22]Addiction don't always kick the door
[03:23.62]Sometimes it uses your own voice
[03:27.04]Sometimes it says you earned it
[03:29.54]At the counter with the music low
[03:32.74]Caught in my head, heart in my throat
[03:34.84]I ask myself do I need this?
[03:37.54]Then laugh like it's some kind of joke
[03:40.52]What else could I do with this money?
[03:42.98]What else could I do?
[03:44.12]What else could I do with this pain?
[03:46.52]What man keeps building the future?
[03:49.28]Then burning the bridge in the rain
[03:51.28]I'm chasing the dragon under the elevated
[03:54.92]Baby, trying to find a way out of this pain
[03:55.86]Trying to catch what don't come back no more
[03:58.34]I can make it feel close
[04:00.84]I can open that door
[04:02.77]It don't feel like addiction
[04:04.90]It feels like tomorrow
[04:06.18]Feels like one more night
[04:07.84]Feels like borrowed sorrow
[04:10.36]Borrow it baby, you can pay it later
[04:13.60]And the dragon don't fly no more
[04:16.18]To the one saying I can stop
[04:19.40]But never really stops
[04:21.88]This is the sign
[04:22.58]Not shame
[04:23.32]Not judgment
[04:24.18]Not judgment
[04:25.86]Only love
[04:26.12]No need to look back home
[04:26.16]Do I really need this?
[04:28.08]Do I really want this?
[04:29.56]Am I really free if I keep running from the honest?
[04:32.26]Do I wanna stop, or do I wanna hide?
[04:34.94]Do I want my life back?
[04:36.34]Or another alibi?
[04:37.82]Nobody knows you like I know you
[04:40.70]Nobody holds you like I hold you
[04:43.74]That's not love
[04:44.88]That's not peace
[04:46.24]That's you taking little pieces outta me
[04:49.02]I don't need to hit bottom just to prove the bottom's real
[04:51.92]I don't need another bottle just to tell me how to feel
[04:54.78]Help me hear me
[04:55.84]I'm still in here, don't fear me
[04:59.18]I look alright, but I'm not okay
[05:01.66]I keep surviving, but I wanna change
[05:05.36]Call me, hold me, don't shame me
[05:09.36]Just know me, I need love, I need truth
[05:13.78]I need somebody to pull me through
[05:18.98]One more night, one more flame, one more
[05:22.32]I'm not chasing a dragon under the elevated
[05:25.82]Not tonight, not like before
[05:28.24]First time gone, I'm done here waiting
[05:31.40]For a ghost to get in
[05:33.42]It did feel like addiction
[05:34.97]When I finally saw the chain
[05:37.10]It did feel like a prison
[05:39.26]When I called in
[05:42.46]by its name
[05:43.46]I wanna live
[05:44.76]More than I want that fire
[05:47.04]I want the truth
[05:49.31]More than I want the liar
[05:51.36]2
[05:52.32]And the dragon don't fly, no more
[05:56.60]You'll miss me by morning
[05:57.66]Maybe I will
[05:58.97]You call me when it hurts
[06:00.66]I'll call someone real
[06:02.46]You'll come back to me
[06:03.84]Not this time
[06:04.84]For anybody fighting quiet
[06:08.60]You are not the thing you're fighting
[06:10.12]Cry out,
[06:12.18]reach out
[06:12.64]Come back
[06:13.34]The night is loud
[06:14.52]But you are louder
[06:15.89]Help me, I'm ready
[06:17.32]One more
[06:20.74]One more
[06:21.22]No
